ideas.name: Account Intelligence
ideas.desc: 360-degree account briefings with stakeholder mapping, competitive analysis, and deal risk assessment. Surfaces org charts, news, stakeholder interests, competitive positioning, and produces executive-ready briefing documents from CRM and engagement data.

ideas.name: Deal Progression
ideas.desc: Pipeline health analysis, stalled-deal detection, action plan generation, and pipeline acceleration. Tracks deal progression across the full pipeline, identifies stalled opportunities using stage-velocity benchmarks, and generates blocker-specific action plans.

ideas.name: Competitive Intelligence
ideas.desc: Analyzes competitive landscapes, win/loss patterns, and generates battlecards for enterprise deals. Reviews win/loss records, generates positioning guides, and builds counter-positioning strategies.

ideas.name: Meeting Prep
ideas.desc: Generates pre-meeting briefs, talking points, objection prep, and follow-up templates. Combines account intelligence, stakeholder data, and competitive context into actionable meeting materials.

ideas.name: Proposal Generation
ideas.desc: AI-powered proposal generation with RFP analysis, personalized content, pricing optimization, and competitive positioning. Analyzes RFPs, generates executive summaries, builds solution pricing, selects references, and assembles proposal packages.

ideas.name: Sales Qualification
ideas.desc: ICP scoring, BANT analysis, personalized outreach, AE routing, and SLA tracking for inbound leads. Scores inbound leads against an Ideal Customer Profile and performs BANT analysis.

ideas.name: Win/Loss Analysis
ideas.desc: AI-powered win/loss analysis with pattern recognition, competitive insights, revenue recovery modeling, and board-ready presentations. Analyzes closed opportunities to surface win-rate trends and root-cause loss patterns.

ideas.name: Revenue Forecast
ideas.desc: Quarterly forecasting, scenario analysis, commit vs best-case modeling, and forecast accuracy tracking. Generates quarterly revenue forecasts using weighted pipeline analysis and runs scenario modeling.

ideas.name: Stakeholder Intelligence
ideas.desc: Maps org charts, analyzes buying committees, and scores relationship strength for enterprise accounts. Identifies engagement gaps and provides actionable recommendations for stakeholder engagement and champion development.

ideas.name: Deal Health Score
ideas.desc: Calculates composite deal health scores (0-100) based on engagement metrics, activity frequency, stakeholder sentiment, and stage progression velocity. Provides trend analysis, benchmark comparisons, and proactive health alerts.

ideas.name: Next Best Action
ideas.desc: Recommends prioritized next-best actions for each deal based on stage, risk factors, engagement history, and rep profiles. Generates sequenced action plans and forecasts expected impact.

ideas.name: Stalled Deal Detection
ideas.desc: Detects stalled deals by comparing stage duration against configurable thresholds, performs root cause analysis, generates intervention plans with day-by-day actions, and provides stall prevention recommendations.
